what: US forecasts, observations, alerts, gridded point data
notes: JSON (GeoJSON/JSON-LD). No key; set a User-Agent header. US coverage only.

what: Global Forecast System numerical weather model, all variables
notes: GRIB2; runs 00/06/12/18z. grib_filter for byte-range subsets. Mirrored on AWS Open Data.

what: ECMWF open real-time global forecasts (0.25deg), incl. AIFS
notes: GRIB2; ecmwf-opendata python client. ~30-day retention.

what: ERA5 reanalysis + seasonal forecasts, climate datasets
notes: GRIB/NetCDF via cdsapi. New CDS (post Sep-2024 migration). Accept dataset licence; queued retrievals.

what: Free forecast + historical weather (30+ models, reanalysis from 1940)
notes: JSON, simple HTTP GET, no key for non-commercial. Paid plan for commercial/high volume.

what: Oceanic Nino Index (3-mo running SST anomaly) defining El Nino/La Nina
notes: Plain text. Updated first Thursday monthly. CPC promoted RONI as new headline metric Feb-2026; ONI still published.

what: Weekly/monthly Nino1+2/3/3.4/4 SST and anomaly series
notes: ASCII files. Good for raw ENSO state inputs.

source: NOAA Coral Reef Watch SST anomaly (ERDDAP)
what: Daily global 5km satellite sea-surface-temperature anomaly, 1985-present
notes: ERDDAP griddap: NetCDF/CSV/JSON, subset by lat/lon/time via URL. CoralTemp product.

what: Weekly US drought severity by area/population/category
notes: REST: CSV default, XML/JSON via Accept header. GIS layers at droughtmonitor.unl.edu. Released Thursdays.

what: Combined Drought Indicator (CDI), SPI, soil moisture anomaly (Europe & global)
notes: GeoTIFF/NetCDF, ~5km, 10-day step from 2012. EDO=Europe, GDO=global.

what: US agricultural production/yield/acreage/stocks/prices estimates
notes: JSON/CSV/XML. Free key. Hard cap 50,000 records/query; narrow filters.

what: World ag supply/demand estimates; global Production-Supply-Distribution by commodity
notes: WASDE = consolidated CSV day after release; PSD has a Web API + bulk files.

what: Global food-security country briefs and domestic/international food price series
notes: FPMA Tool covers ~90 countries; export CSV/Excel. No clean REST API; scrape/export.

what: US + international energy: crude/products inventories, output, prices, STEO
notes: JSON. Free key. 115k+ petroleum series; weekly stocks (WPSR) Wed, NG storage Thu.

what: US weekly working natural-gas in underground storage
notes: CSV/HTML; also via EIA API v2. Released Thursday 10:30 ET. Market-moving for Henry Hub.

what: National monthly oil/gas production, demand, imports, stocks (~100 countries)
notes: CSV/TXT bulk files. Updated ~20th monthly. Self-reported, lagged ~1 month.

what: Weekly US/international active oil & gas drilling rig counts
notes: Excel/CSV downloads. US count released Fridays. Leading proxy for upstream activity.

what: Live global AIS vessel positions/identity via websocket
notes: JSON over websocket; subscribe by bounding box / MMSI. Coverage gaps mid-ocean.

what: Community AIS network vessel positions
notes: XML/JSON. Free only if you feed your own AIS receiver data back (reciprocal).

what: Vessel positions, port calls, ETA, voyage history
notes: PAID (Kpler-owned); enterprise pricing, no meaningful free API tier.

what: Monthly canal transits, tonnage, vessel mix, draft/booking advisories
notes: HTML/PDF operations reports + advisories (no public REST API). Scrape monthly stats.

what: Periodic navigation statistics: transits, net tonnage by ship type
notes: PDF/Excel navigation reports. No API; download + parse. Useful for Red Sea reroute monitoring.

what: Dry-bulk and tanker freight rate indices (BDI/BCI/BPI/BSI)
notes: PAID/subscription for full data. BDI headline value free via third-party sites (delayed).

what: Monthly global benchmark commodity prices (energy, metals, agri, fertilizers)
notes: Excel + PDF. No API; stable file URL. Released early each month.

what: Delayed quotes + historical OHLCV for equities, FX, futures, indices
notes: JSON; UNOFFICIAL, can break, rate-limited. ~15-min delayed; commodities via futures tickers (CL=F, GC=F).

what: Free daily/intraday OHLCV: stocks, FX, indices, commodities, bonds
notes: CSV via ?s=SYMBOL&i=d (e.g. wti.f, eurusd). No formal API/SLA; bulk zips available. EOD focus.

what: Base-metals official/closing prices and stocks (Al, Cu, Zn, Ni, Pb, Sn)
notes: Free = next-day DELAYED prices after registration. Real-time/redistribution are PAID.

what: Curated free + premium econ/commodity/futures time series
notes: JSON/CSV. Free key; many once-free commodity tables now premium. Some CB/futures datasets remain free.

what: 800k+ US & global macro/rates/commodity series
notes: JSON/XML. Free key. Includes DGS yields, WTI/Brent, DXY proxies. Excellent hub.

what: Euro-area rates, FX reference rates, monetary & financial stats
notes: SDMX 2.1 REST: SDMX-ML/SDMX-JSON/CSV. Daily EUR FX ref rates ~16:00 CET. No key.

what: US selected interest rates incl. Treasury yields, fed funds
notes: CSV/XML via DDP query builder. H.15 = canonical US rates.

what: Daily Treasury par yield curve, rates, debt, exchange rates
notes: JSON/CSV/XML, no key, paginated. Official daily yield curve. Clean modern REST.

what: Weekly futures/options positioning by trader category
notes: Socrata API (JSON/CSV), SoQL filters. Released Fri 15:30 ET for Tue data. History to 1986/2006.

what: Full historical COT report archives (annual/compressed)
notes: Zipped CSV/Excel by year. Use for backfilling long positioning history.

what: Bilateral merchandise trade flows by HS commodity, ~200 reporters since 1962
notes: JSON. Free key: 500 calls/day, up to 100k records/call. Premium for bulk.

what: Global development/macro indicators (GDP, CPI, trade, energy use)
notes: JSON/XML, no key, paginated. Annual-ish cadence; great country-level context layer.

what: IFS, BOP, DOTS trade, commodity price indices, exchange rates
notes: SDMX-JSON/ML. IMF migrated to new data portal/API 2024-25; verify dataflow IDs. DOT = bilateral trade.

what: USD reference rates vs ~160 currencies
notes: Keyless open endpoint; CORS open; refreshes ~once per day (time_next_update).

what: Spot gold and silver price (USD/oz)
notes: Keyless; CORS open; spot precious metals.

what: Weekly large-speculator (non-commercial) net positioning, futures
notes: Socrata; CORS open; lagged ~3 days. Curated exact-contract map for 13 commodities.

what: Official ECB EUR/USD daily reference rate
notes: SDMX-JSON; keyless; CORS open; official central-bank fix.
